alpha.text: Borealise is in early development. Expect bugs, missing features, and breaking changes.

auth.welcomeSubtitle: The social music platform where you DJ, discover, and connect.

footer.tagline: Music is better together. Join rooms, share tracks, and connect with music lovers worldwide.

hero.title: Music is better
hero.subtitle: Join rooms, take turns as DJ, discover new music, and connect with people who share your taste. The social listening experience, reborn.

features.title: Remember when music was social?
features.subtitle: Borealise brings back the magic of shared music experiences. Create or join rooms, take turns playing tracks, chat with fellow music lovers, and discover your next favorite song through real human connection.

rooms.title: Community Rooms
rooms.description: Join themed rooms or create your own. From indie rock to lo-fi beats, find your tribe and share the music you love.

dj.title: Take the DJ Booth
dj.description: Queue up, grab the decks, and play for the room. Get real-time reactions with woots and mehs from your audience.

chat.title: Live Chat
chat.description: React to tracks in real-time, share your thoughts, make friends, and build lasting connections around music.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Getting started is simple. Join the community in seconds.

step1.title: Create Account
step1.description: Sign up for free and customize your avatar.

step2.title: Find a Room
step2.description: Browse rooms by genre or create your own community.

step3.title: Build Playlists
step3.description: Add tracks from YouTube and SoundCloud to your playlist.

step4.title: Start DJing
step4.description: Join the waitlist, play your tracks, and earn recognition.

why.title: Built for the community,
why.text1: We grew up on platforms like plug.dj and turntable.fm. When they shut down, we lost more than just a website - we lost our communities, our friendships, and our shared musical journeys.
why.text2: Borealise is our answer. A modern, reliable platform built with the latest technology to ensure it stays online. No ads interrupting your vibe. No algorithms deciding what you hear. Just you, your friends, and the music.

cta.title: Ready to rediscover music?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of music lovers already sharing their favorite tracks. Your next favorite song is waiting.

shop.title: Avatar Shop
shop.freeAvatarsDesc: These avatars are available to everyone at no cost.

roomSettings.title: Room Settings
roomSettings.notHost: Only the host or co-host can edit room settings.
roomSettings.fieldWelcomeHint: Shown to users when they join the room.
roomSettings.fieldMinChatLevelHint: Users below this level cannot send messages. Set to 0 to allow everyone.
roomSettings.fieldWaitlistLockedDesc: Prevent new users from joining the DJ queue.
roomSettings.fieldWaitlistCycleDesc: DJs are moved to the back of the queue after their turn.

friends.title: Friends
friends.noFriendsHint: Search for users and send them a friend request!
